texto: Love is the most mysterious force in the universe.It locks two souls together across space and time.Once that spark is ignited it consumes all else.It was that shard of light that transformed a dark soul forever.Now let that love burn bright like a sun for eternity…
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kion Ahadi: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Love is the most mysterious force in the universe.It locks two souls together across space and ti…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, love, universe pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e reflexao-noturna.
